problem.title: Remove Duplicates From Sorted Array Ii

approaches.title: Two-pointers single-pass with seen count
approaches.summary: Iterate once, track seen count per value, and overwrite duplicates beyond two occurrences in-place.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial two-pointer implementation tracking seen count per value.

approaches.title: Two-pointers optimized with early exit
approaches.summary: Use two pointers and compare with the value two positions back to allow at most two duplicates; early exit for small arrays.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Optimized two-pointer approach with early exit for arrays shorter than 3 elements.
